name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Arrival Women's Mini WALLACE Bag. BV interprets classic bag shapes with special materials every season. The bento bag has been very popular in new arrivals in recent years. The new winter release features lambskin and ramie wool combined, making it a warm and cute winter accessory. Carrying a small bag is convenient and beautiful when wearing thicker clothes.
